ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state or province where the event is held */,
  "event_count" INTEGER /* Total number of events recorded in the state */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players participating in the event */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total rounds played in the event */,
  "cash_prize" REAL /* Total cash prize awarded in the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., basketball, soccer, etc.) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the player */,
  "total_throws" INTEGER /* Total number of throws made by the player */,
  "rated_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds rated 1000 or higher by the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the player is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this round is associated with */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the event */,
  "round_details" TEXT /* Details about the rounds played */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "winning_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_winning_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash prize entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the cash prize */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cash prize awarded */,
  "prize_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the prize (e.g., 1st place, 2nd place, etc.) */,
  "number_of_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners in this prize tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_prizes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event these statistics belong to */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players at the event */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played in the event */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of players in the event */,
  "highest_score" REAL /* Highest score achieved in the event */,
  "player_rankings" TEXT /* JSON array of player rankings with scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., organizer, statistician) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the role (e.g., basic, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
